role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified script types (Kanji/Hiragana) and their significance.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation, and infrastructure style within domain.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified plant species (Musa) and their biogeographic relevance.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road infrastructure (guardrails, manhole) and signage.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized architectural and infrastructural cues correctly.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Text on sign matches image perfectly.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: All five agents unanimously identified Japan based on strong, image-grounded evidence (Japanese script, specific guardrail style, manhole cover, banana plants). The judge correctly followed Path A (consensus) and made the correct final decision.
verdict.region_narrowing_notes: Perfect consensus among all agents on the region (East Asia/Japan). The judge correctly identified this and skipped the region hypothesis phase.
verdict.hypothesis_pool_notes: The pool contained the correct answer (Japan). Given the unanimous agent agreement, the pool was perfectly aligned with the visual evidence.
